---
title: "SDM_Calculation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-01"
---

Loading Packages
```{r}
library(adehabitatHS) #PCA, page 161, ENFA
library(dplyr) #Data management
library(ggplot2) #graphinh
library(gstat) #geostat
library(here) # to use here directory to open data files easier
library(PresenceAbsence)
library(pROC) #ENFA
library(randomForest) #RF Model
library(raster) #Raster working
library(tidyverse) #Data management
library(terra) #SDM Package

set.seed(123)
```


Loading in Data 
```{r}

cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/cq_df.csv"))
ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/ct_df.csv"))
aa<- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/aa_df.csv"))

```

Test and train Data frames
```{r}
#splitting into training data --> cq
train_indices_cq <- sample(1:nrow(cq), size = 0.8 *nrow(cq)) #taking a random sample from cq
train_data_cq <- cq[train_indices_cq,]
test_data_cq <- cq[-train_indices_cq,]
nrow(train_data_cq) 
nrow(test_data_cq) 

#write.csv(train_data_cq, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/train_data_cq.csv"))
#write.csv(test_data_cq, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))



# Ct
train_indices_ct <- sample(1:nrow(ct), size = 0.8 *nrow(ct)) #taking a random sample from ct
train_data_ct <- ct[train_indices_ct,]
test_data_ct <- ct[-train_indices_ct,]
nrow(train_data_ct) 
nrow(test_data_ct) 

#write.csv(train_data_ct, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/train_data_ct.csv"))
#write.csv(test_data_ct, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))



#aa
train_indices_aa <- sample(1:nrow(aa), size = 0.8 *nrow(aa)) #taking a random sample from aa
train_data_aa <- aa[train_indices_aa,]
test_data_aa <- aa[-train_indices_aa,]
nrow(train_data_aa) 
nrow(test_data_aa) 

#write.csv(train_data_aa, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/train_data_aa.csv"))
#write.csv(test_data_aa, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
```


```{r}
train_data_cq<-read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/train_data_cq.csv"))
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
```




GLM - cq
```{r}
glm_model_cq_h20 <- glm(cq ~ 
                        NDVI+ MNDWI + prec1 + prec2 + tmin1 + tavg1 + tmax1 + humd2, 
                        data = train_data_cq, family = binomial(link = "logit"))


#saveRDS(glm_model_cq_h20, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_cq_h20.rds"))


glm_model_cq <- glm(cq ~ prec1 + prec2 + tmin1 + tavg1 + tmax1 + humd2, 
                    data = train_data_cq, family = binomial(link = "logit"))

#saveRDS(glm_model_cq, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_cq.rds"))
```


GLM ct
```{r}
glm_model_ct_h20 <- glm(ct ~ 
                        NDVI+ MNDWI+ prec1 + prec2 + tmin1 + tavg1+ tmax1+ humd2, 
                        data = train_data_ct, family = binomial(link = "logit"))

glm_model_ct<- glm(ct ~ 
                        prec1 + prec2 + tmin1 + tavg1+ tmax1+ humd2, 
                        data = train_data_ct,, family = binomial(link = "logit"))


#saveRDS(glm_model_ct_h20, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_ct_h20.rds"))
#saveRDS(glm_model_ct, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_ct.rds"))


```


GLM aa
```{r}
glm_model_aa_h20 <- glm(aa~ 
                          NDVI+ MNDWI+ prec1+ prec2+ tmin2+ tavg2+ humd2+ tmax2, 
                          data = train_data_aa, family = binomial(link = "logit"))

glm_model_aa <- glm(aa ~ 
                      prec1+ prec2+ tmin2+ tavg2+ humd2+ tmax2, 
                      data = train_data_aa, family = binomial(link = "logit"))

#saveRDS(glm_model_aa_h20, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_aa_h20.rds"))
#saveRDS(glm_model_aa, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_aa.rds"))

```


RF-cq
```{r}

rf_model_cq_h2o <- randomForest(x = train_data_cq[, c("NDVI", "MNDWI", "prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", 
                                                      "tavg1", "tmax1", "humd2")],
                                 y=as.factor(train_data_cq$cq), nodesize = 10, ntree = 100)

rf_model_cq <- randomForest(x = train_data_cq[, c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", "tavg1", 
                                                    "tmax1", "humd2")],
                                 y=as.factor(train_data_cq$cq), nodesize = 10, ntree = 100)

#saveRDS(rf_model_cq_h2o, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_cq_h2o.rds"))
#saveRDS(rf_model_cq, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_cq.rds"))


```


RF -ct
```{r}
rf_model_ct_h2o <- randomForest(x = train_data_ct[, c( "NDVI", "MNDWI", "prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", 
                                                       "tavg1","tmax1", "humd2")], 
                                y=as.factor(train_data_ct$ct), nodesize = 10, ntree = 100)

rf_model_ct <- randomForest(x = train_data_ct[, c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", 
                                                       "tavg1","tmax1", "humd2")], 
                                y=as.factor(train_data_ct$ct), nodesize = 10, ntree = 100)

#saveRDS(rf_model_ct_h2o, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_ct_h2o.rds"))
#saveRDS(rf_model_ct, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_ct.rds"))

```


RF - aa
```{r}
rf_model_aa_h2o <- randomForest(x = train_data_aa[, c("NDVI", "MNDWI", "prec1", "prec2", "tmin2", 
                                                      "tavg2","humd2", "tmax2")],  
                                  y=as.factor(train_data_aa$aa), nodesize = 10, ntree = 100)

rf_model_aa <- randomForest(x = train_data_aa[, c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin2","tavg2","humd2", 
                                                  "tmax2")], 
                                      y=as.factor(train_data_aa$aa), nodesize = 10, ntree = 100)

#saveRDS(rf_model_aa_h2o, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_aa_h2o.rds"))
#saveRDS(rf_model_aa, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_aa.rds"))

```


ENFA - cq
```{r}
pc_cq_h2o <- dudi.pca(train_data_cq[, c("NDVI", "MNDWI", "prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", 
                                        "tavg1", "tmax1", "humd2")], 
                                      scannf = FALSE, nf =2)
ENFA_cq_h2o <- enfa(pc_cq_h2o, train_data_cq$cq, scan = FALSE)


pc_cq <- dudi.pca(train_data_cq[, c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", "tavg1", "tmax1", "humd2")], 
                                      scannf = FALSE, nf =2)
ENFA_cq <- enfa(pc_cq, train_data_cq$cq, scan = FALSE)

#saveRDS(ENFA_cq_h2o, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/ENFA_cq_h2o.rds"))
#saveRDS(ENFA_cq, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/ENFA_cq.rds"))

```



ENFA - ct
```{r}

pc_ct_h2o <- dudi.pca(train_data_ct[, c("NDVI", "MNDWI", "prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", 
                                                       "tavg1","tmax1", "humd2")], 
                                      scannf = FALSE, nf =2)
ENFA_ct_h2o <- enfa(pc_ct_h2o, train_data_ct$ct, scan = FALSE)


pc_ct <- dudi.pca(train_data_ct[, c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin1","tavg1","tmax1", "humd2")], 
                                      scannf = FALSE, nf =2)
ENFA_ct <- enfa(pc_ct, train_data_ct$ct, scan = FALSE)

#saveRDS(ENFA_ct_h2o, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/ENFA_ct_h2o.rds"))
#saveRDS(ENFA_ct, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/ENFA_ct.rds"))

```



ENFA - aa
```{r}

pc_aa_h2o <- dudi.pca(train_data_aa[, c("NDVI", "MNDWI", "prec1", "prec2", "tmin2", 
                                                      "tavg2","humd2", "tmax2")], 
                                      scannf = FALSE, nf =2)
ENFA_aa_h2o <- enfa(pc_aa_h2o, train_data_aa$aa, scan = FALSE)


pc_aa <- dudi.pca(train_data_aa[, c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin2", "tavg2","humd2", "tmax2")], 
                                      scannf = FALSE, nf =2)
ENFA_aa <- enfa(pc_aa, train_data_aa$aa, scan = FALSE)

#saveRDS(ENFA_aa_h2o, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/ENFA_aa_h2o.rds"))
#saveRDS(ENFA_aa, file = here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/ENFA_aa.rds"))

```


Loading in Weather Tiffs
```{r}
maricopa <- extent(-112.573997704, -111.5837, 33.2043, 33.7987)

#NDVI <- rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/NDVI.tif")
#MNDWI <-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/MNDWI.tif")

#YW201319
humd1_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw201319<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201319/tmin2.tif")

#making one raster for this year
YW201319_list <-c(humd1_yw201319, humd2_yw201319, prec1_yw201319, prec2_yw201319, tavg1_yw201319,tavg2_yw201319,tmax1_yw201319, tmax2_yw201319, tmin1_yw201319,tmin2_yw201319, NDVI, MNDWI)
YW201319_rast <-stack(YW201319_list)

YW201319_rast <- crop(YW201319_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW201319_rast)
#writeRaster(YW201319_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW201319_rast.tif"), overwrite = TRUE)

#YW201332
humd1_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw201332<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201332/tmin2.tif")


#making one raster for this year
yw201332_list <-c(humd1_yw201332, humd2_yw201332, prec1_yw201332, prec2_yw201332, tavg1_yw201332,tavg2_yw201332,tmax1_yw201332, tmax2_yw201332, tmin1_yw201332,tmin2_yw201332, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw201332_rast <-stack(yw201332_list)

yw201332_rast <- crop(yw201332_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW201332_rast)
writeRaster(yw201332_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW201332_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)


#YW201345
humd1_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw201345<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201345/tmin2.tif")

#making one raster for this year
yw201345_list <-c(humd1_yw201345, humd2_yw201345, prec1_yw201345, prec2_yw201345, tavg1_yw201345,tavg2_yw201345,tmax1_yw201345, tmax2_yw201345, tmin1_yw201345,tmin2_yw201345, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw201345_rast <-stack(yw201345_list)

yw201345_rast <- crop(yw201345_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW201345_rast)
#writeRaster(yw201345_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW201345_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)


#YW201719
humd1_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw201719<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201719/tmin2.tif")


#making one raster for this year
yw201719_list <-c(humd1_yw201719, humd2_yw201719, prec1_yw201719, prec2_yw201719, tavg1_yw201719,tavg2_yw201719,tmax1_yw201719, tmax2_yw201719, tmin1_yw201719,tmin2_yw201719, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw201719_rast <-stack(yw201719_list)

yw201719_rast <- crop(yw201719_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW201719_rast)
#writeRaster(yw201719_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW201719_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)


#YW201732
humd1_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw201732<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201732/tmin2.tif")

#making one raster for this year
yw201732_list <-c(humd1_yw201732, humd2_yw201732, prec1_yw201732, prec2_yw201732, tavg1_yw201732,tavg2_yw201732,tmax1_yw201732, tmax2_yw201732, tmin1_yw201732,tmin2_yw201732, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw201732_rast <-stack(yw201732_list)

yw201732_rast <- crop(yw201732_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW201732_rast)
#writeRaster(yw201732_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW201732_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)


#YW201745
humd1_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw201745<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw201745/tmin2.tif")

#making one raster for this year
yw201745_list <-c(humd1_yw201745, humd2_yw201745, prec1_yw201745, prec2_yw201745, tavg1_yw201745,tavg2_yw201745,tmax1_yw201745, tmax2_yw201745, tmin1_yw201745,tmin2_yw201745, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw201745_rast <-stack(yw201745_list)

yw201745_rast <- crop(yw201745_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW201745_rast)
#writeRaster(yw201745_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW201745_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)


#YW202119
humd1_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw202119<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202119/tmin2.tif")

#making one raster for this year
yw202119_list <-c(humd1_yw202119, humd2_yw202119, prec1_yw202119, prec2_yw202119, tavg1_yw202119,tavg2_yw202119,tmax1_yw202119, tmax2_yw202119, tmin1_yw202119,tmin2_yw202119, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw202119_rast <-stack(yw202119_list)

yw202119_rast <- crop(yw202119_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW202119_rast)
#writeRaster(yw202119_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW202119_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)



#YW202132
humd1_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw202132<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202132/tmin2.tif")

#making one raster for this year
yw202132_list <-c(humd1_yw202132, humd2_yw202132, prec1_yw202132, prec2_yw202132, tavg1_yw202132,tavg2_yw202132,tmax1_yw202132, tmax2_yw202132, tmin1_yw202132,tmin2_yw202132, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw202132_rast <-stack(yw202132_list)

yw202132_rast <- crop(yw202132_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW202132_rast)
#writeRaster(yw202132_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW202132_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)


#YW202145
humd1_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/humd1.tif")
humd2_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/humd2.tif")
prec1_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/prec1.tif")
prec2_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/prec2.tif")
tavg1_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/tavg1.tif")
tavg2_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/tavg2.tif")
tmax1_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/tmax1.tif")
tmax2_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/tmax2.tif")
tmin1_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/tmin1.tif")
tmin2_yw202145<-rast("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/data/yw202145/tmin2.tif")

#Making year raster
yw202145_list <-c(humd1_yw202145, humd2_yw202145, prec1_yw202145, prec2_yw202145, tavg1_yw202145,tavg2_yw202145,tmax1_yw202145, tmax2_yw202145, tmin1_yw202145,tmin2_yw202145, NDVI, MNDWI)
yw202145_rast <-stack(yw202145_list)

yw202145_rast <- crop(yw202145_rast, maricopa)
#plot(YW202145_rast)
#writeRaster(yw202145_rast, here("Natalie/data_cleaned/Env_raster/YW202145_rast.tiff"), overwrite = TRUE)
```


cq-predict
```{r}
cq_subset <- c("humd2", "prec1", "prec2", "tavg1","tmax1", "tmin1")
cq_subset_h2o <- c("humd2", "prec1", "prec2", "tavg1","tmax1", "tmin1", "NDVI", "MNDWI")

#Subsetting years
yw201319_cq <- subset(YW201319_rast, cq_subset)
yw201319_cq_h2o <- subset(YW201319_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw201332_cq <-subset(yw201332_rast, cq_subset)
yw201332_cq_h2o <- subset(yw201332_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw201345_cq <-subset(yw201345_rast, cq_subset)
yw201345_cq_h2o<-subset(yw201345_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw201719_cq<-subset(yw201719_rast, cq_subset)
yw201719_cq_h2o <-subset(yw201719_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw201732_cq<-subset(yw201732_rast, cq_subset)
yw201732_cq_h2o <-subset(yw201732_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw201745_cq<-subset(yw201745_rast, cq_subset)
yw201745_cq_h2o <-subset(yw201745_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw202119_cq<-subset(yw202119_rast, cq_subset)
yw202119_cq_h2o <-subset(yw202119_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw202132_cq<-subset(yw202132_rast, cq_subset)
yw202132_cq_h2o <-subset(yw202132_rast, cq_subset_h2o)
yw202145_cq<-subset(yw202145_rast, cq_subset)
yw202145_cq_h2o <- subset(yw202145_rast, cq_subset_h2o)


#**GLM**
#glm_model_cq_h20 <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_cq_h20.rds"))
#glm_model_cq <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_cq.rds"))

cq201319_glm <- predict(yw201319_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq201319_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201319_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201332_glm <- predict(yw201332_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq201332_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201332_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201345_glm <- predict(yw201345_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq201345_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201345_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201919_glm <- predict(yw201719_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq201919_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201719_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201932_glm <- predict(yw201732_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq201932_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201732_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201945_glm <- predict(yw201745_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq201945_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201745_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq202119_glm <- predict(yw202119_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq202119_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202119_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq202132_glm <- predict(yw202132_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq202132_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202132_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water


cq202145_glm <- predict(yw202145_cq, glm_model_cq) #without water
cq202145_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202145_cq_h2o, glm_model_cq_h20) #with water


#writeRaster(cq201319_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201319_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201332_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201332_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201345_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201345_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201919_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201345_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201919_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201932_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201932_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201932_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201945_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201945_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202119_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202119_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202132_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202132_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202145_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202145_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_h2o_glm.tif")


#**RF**
#rf_model_cq_h20 <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_cq_h2o.rds"))
#rf_model_cq <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_cq.rds"))

cq201319_rf <- predict(yw201319_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq201319_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201319_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201332_rf <- predict(yw201332_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq201332_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201332_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201345_rf <- predict(yw201345_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq201345_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201345_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201919_rf <- predict(yw201719_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq201919_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201719_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201932_rf <- predict(yw201732_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq201932_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201732_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq201945_rf <- predict(yw201745_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq201945_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201745_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq202119_rf <- predict(yw202119_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq202119_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202119_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq202132_rf <- predict(yw202132_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq202132_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202132_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

cq202145_rf <- predict(yw202145_cq, rf_model_cq) #without water
cq202145_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202145_cq_h2o, rf_model_cq_h20) #with water

#writeRaster(cq201319_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201319_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201332_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201332_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201345_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201345_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201919_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201345_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201919_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201932_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201932_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201932_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201945_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq201945_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202119_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202119_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202132_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202132_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202145_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(cq202145_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_h2o_rf.tif")
```





ct-predict
```{r}
ct_subset <- c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", "tavg1", "tmax1", "humd2")
ct_subset_h2o <- c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin1", "tavg1", "tmax1", "humd2", "NDVI", "MNDWI")

#Subsetting years
yw201319_ct <- subset(YW201319_rast, ct_subset)
yw201319_ct_h2o <- subset(YW201319_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw201332_ct <-subset(yw201332_rast, ct_subset)
yw201332_ct_h2o <- subset(yw201332_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw201345_ct <-subset(yw201345_rast, ct_subset)
yw201345_ct_h2o<-subset(yw201345_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw201719_ct<-subset(yw201719_rast, ct_subset)
yw201719_ct_h2o <-subset(yw201719_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw201732_ct<-subset(yw201732_rast, ct_subset)
yw201732_ct_h2o <-subset(yw201732_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw201745_ct<-subset(yw201745_rast, ct_subset)
yw201745_ct_h2o <-subset(yw201745_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw202119_ct<-subset(yw202119_rast, ct_subset)
yw202119_ct_h2o <-subset(yw202119_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw202132_ct<-subset(yw202132_rast, ct_subset)
yw202132_ct_h2o <-subset(yw202132_rast, ct_subset_h2o)
yw202145_ct<-subset(yw202145_rast, ct_subset)
yw202145_ct_h2o <- subset(yw202145_rast, ct_subset_h2o)


#**GLM**
#glm_model_ct_h20 <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_ct_h20.rds"))
#glm_model_ct <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_ct.rds"))

ct201319_glm <- predict(yw201319_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct201319_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201319_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201332_glm <- predict(yw201332_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct201332_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201332_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201345_glm <- predict(yw201345_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct201345_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201345_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201919_glm <- predict(yw201719_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct201919_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201719_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201932_glm <- predict(yw201732_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct201932_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201732_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201945_glm <- predict(yw201745_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct201945_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201745_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct202119_glm <- predict(yw202119_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct202119_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202119_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct202132_glm <- predict(yw202132_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct202132_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202132_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct202145_glm <- predict(yw202145_ct, glm_model_ct) #without water
ct202145_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202145_ct_h2o, glm_model_ct_h20) #with water


#writeRaster(ct201319_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201319_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201332_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201332_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201345_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201345_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201919_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201345_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201919_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201932_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201945_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201945_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202119_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202119_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202132_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202132_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202145_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202145_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_h2o_glm.tif")

#**RF**

rf_model_ct_h20 <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_ct_h2o.rds"))
rf_model_ct <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_ct.rds"))

ct201319_rf <- predict(yw201319_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct201319_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201319_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201332_rf <- predict(yw201332_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct201332_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201332_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201345_rf <- predict(yw201345_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct201345_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201345_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201919_rf <- predict(yw201719_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct201919_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201719_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201932_rf <- predict(yw201732_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct201932_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201732_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct201945_rf <- predict(yw201745_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct201945_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201745_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct202119_rf <- predict(yw202119_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct202119_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202119_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct202132_rf <- predict(yw202132_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct202132_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202132_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water

ct202145_rf <- predict(yw202145_ct, rf_model_ct) #without water
ct202145_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202145_ct_h2o, rf_model_ct_h20) #with water


#writeRaster(ct201319_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201319_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201332_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201332_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201345_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201345_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201919_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201345_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201919_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201932_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201945_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct201945_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202119_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202119_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202132_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202132_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202145_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(ct202145_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_h2o_rf.tif")

```



aa-predict 
```{r}
aa_subset <- c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin2", "tavg2", "humd2", "tmax2")
aa_subset_h2o <- c("prec1", "prec2", "tmin2", "tavg2", "humd2", "tmax2", "NDVI", "MNDWI")

#Subsetting years
yw201319_aa <- subset(YW201319_rast, aa_subset)
yw201319_aa_h2o <- subset(YW201319_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw201332_aa <-subset(yw201332_rast, aa_subset)
yw201332_aa_h2o <- subset(yw201332_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw201345_aa <-subset(yw201345_rast, aa_subset)
yw201345_aa_h2o<-subset(yw201345_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw201719_aa<-subset(yw201719_rast, aa_subset)
yw201719_aa_h2o <-subset(yw201719_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw201732_aa<-subset(yw201732_rast, aa_subset)
yw201732_aa_h2o <-subset(yw201732_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw201745_aa<-subset(yw201745_rast, aa_subset)
yw201745_aa_h2o <-subset(yw201745_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw202119_aa<-subset(yw202119_rast, aa_subset)
yw202119_aa_h2o <-subset(yw202119_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw202132_aa<-subset(yw202132_rast, aa_subset)
yw202132_aa_h2o <-subset(yw202132_rast, aa_subset_h2o)
yw202145_aa<-subset(yw202145_rast, aa_subset)
yw202145_aa_h2o <- subset(yw202145_rast, aa_subset_h2o)


#**GLM**

#glm_model_aa_h20 <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_aa_h20.rds"))
#glm_model_aa <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/glm_model_aa.rds"))

aa201319_glm <- predict(yw201319_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa201319_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201319_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201332_glm <- predict(yw201332_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa201332_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201332_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201345_glm <- predict(yw201345_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa201345_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201345_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201919_glm <- predict(yw201719_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa201919_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201719_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201932_glm <- predict(yw201732_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa201932_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201732_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201945_glm <- predict(yw201745_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa201945_h2o_glm <- predict(yw201745_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa202119_glm <- predict(yw202119_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa202119_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202119_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa202132_glm <- predict(yw202132_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa202132_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202132_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa202145_glm <- predict(yw202145_aa, glm_model_aa) #without water
aa202145_h2o_glm <- predict(yw202145_aa_h2o, glm_model_aa_h20) #with water


#writeRaster(aa201319_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201319_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201332_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201332_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201345_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201345_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201919_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201345_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201919_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201932_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201945_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201945_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202119_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202119_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202132_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202132_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_h2o_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202145_glm , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_glm.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202145_h2o_glm, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_h2o_glm.tif")


#**RF**
rf_model_aa_h20 <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_aa_h2o.rds"))
rf_model_aa <- readRDS(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/models/rf_model_aa.rds"))

aa201319_rf <- predict(yw201319_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa201319_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201319_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201332_rf <- predict(yw201332_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa201332_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201332_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201345_rf <- predict(yw201345_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa201345_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201345_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201919_rf <- predict(yw201719_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa201919_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201719_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201932_rf <- predict(yw201732_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa201932_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201732_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa201945_rf <- predict(yw201745_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa201945_h2o_rf <- predict(yw201745_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa202119_rf <- predict(yw202119_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa202119_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202119_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa202132_rf <- predict(yw202132_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa202132_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202132_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water

aa202145_rf <- predict(yw202145_aa, rf_model_aa) #without water
aa202145_h2o_rf <- predict(yw202145_aa_h2o, rf_model_aa_h20) #with water


#writeRaster(aa201319_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201319_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201332_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201332_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201345_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201345_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201919_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201345_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201919_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201932_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201945_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa201945_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202119_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202119_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202132_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202132_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_h2o_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202145_rf , file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_rf.tif")
#writeRaster(aa202145_h2o_rf, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_h2o_rf.tif")


```





Guisan AUC Previous work, RF and Maxent,  
```{r}
#random forest#random forglm_predictest
rf_test_pred <- extract(rf_pred, test_coords, pos_label = 1) 

#Calculating AUC

glm_auc_df <- data.frame(rf_test_pred[,1], test_presence, glm_test_pred[,2])
auc_glm <- auc(glm_auc_df, which.model =1, na.rm = TRUE)
  
rf_auc_df <- data.frame(rf_test_pred[,1], test_presence, rf_test_pred[,2])
auc_rf <- auc(rf_auc_df, which.model =1, na.rm = TRUE)

maxent_auc_df <- data.frame(rf_test_pred[,1], test_presence, maxent_test_pred)


auc_results <- rbind(auc_glm, auc_rf, auc_maxent)
colnames(auc_results) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_results) <-c("GLM", "Rf", "Maxent")


```




Calculating AUC - Guisan Book Example
```{r}
#Creating Data frame of observed and predicted values

#extracting test data and coords to test models.
test_coords <- test_data[, c("lon", "lat")]
test_presence <- test_data$presence

#glm
glm_test_pred <-extract(glm_predict, test_coords, pos_label = 1)


#random forest#random forglm_predictest
rf_test_pred <- extract(rf_pred, test_coords, pos_label = 1) 

#Calculating AUC

glm_auc_df <- data.frame(rf_test_pred[,1], test_presence, glm_test_pred[,2])
auc_glm <- auc(glm_auc_df, which.model =1, na.rm = TRUE)
  
rf_auc_df <- data.frame(rf_test_pred[,1], test_presence, rf_test_pred[,2])
auc_rf <- auc(rf_auc_df, which.model =1, na.rm = TRUE)

maxent_auc_df <- data.frame(rf_test_pred[,1], test_presence, maxent_test_pred)
auc_maxent <- auc(maxent_auc_df, which.model =1, na.rm = TRUE)


auc_results <- rbind(auc_glm, auc_rf, auc_maxent)
colnames(auc_results) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_results) <-c("GLM", "Rf", "Maxent")
```


Ensemble Model **code from previous work**
```{r}
#turning maxent to different spat for enseble purpose
maxent_pred_spat <- rast(maxent_pred)


#ensemble stacking, mean
pred_stack <- stack( x = c(glm_predict, rf_pred, maxent_pred_spat))

#ensemeble stacking, weighted means
weights <- auc_results$AUC / sum(auc_results$AUC)

ensemble_pred <- weighted.mean(pred_stack, w = weights)
plot(ensemble_pred)


#using test data now to get AUC
ensemble_test_pred <- extract(ensemble_pred, test_coords, pos_label = 1)


ensemble_auc_df <- data.frame(rf_test_pred[,1], test_presence, ensemble_test_pred)

auc_ensemble<- auc(ensemble_auc_df, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)

auc_results <- rbind(auc_glm, auc_rf, auc_maxent, auc_ensemble)
colnames(auc_results) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_results) <-c("GLM", "Rf", "Maxent", "Ensemble")

write.csv(auc_results, file = here("data/02_clean/auc/auc_results.sp45"))
```
